title: centaurea haenseleri
intro: Centaurea haenseleri, also known as Haensel's knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and its medicinal properties include the ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Centaurea haenseleri include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for consumption, or used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
